Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corporation is present. Represented by Mario Zuniga.
Attorney Michael Sherwoof Rossoff for the plaintiff.
Defendant Vincent Otyang.is present.
Attorney Catherine Danielson appearing for the defendant.

The Judge Pro Tem , litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of June 23, 2014 remains on calendar.
